 destination process, entity, or store.
- Dashed arrows represent control / feedback flow such as
 alerts, approvals, or status information.
- Double-headed arrows represent a two-way Read/Write
 exchange with a data store, or a request/response pair.
- Each process reads from and/or writes to its relevant
 data store(s)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="980" x="1060" y="2095" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n163" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#000000;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="DATA STORES (NAMING CONVENTION)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="1000" x="2080" y="2060" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n164" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=1.5;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=6;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="1000" x="2080" y="2085" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n165" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=10;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=6;" value="- All data stores start with prefix 'DS_' followed by a
 meaningful noun.
- Examples: DS_USER, DS_CAMPAIGN, DS_DONATION,
 DS_CHATLOG, DS_AUDIT, DS_IMPACT, DS_ADMINLOG.
- Each store holds the persistent data used and produced
 by its related process(es)." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="980" x="2090" y="2095" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- Solid arrow: one-way data flow
(data moves in direction shown)
- Double-headed arrow: two-way
Read/Write exchange with a data store,
or a request/response pair
- Dashed arrow: control or feedback
flow (status, alerts, approvals)

div.div:
All data stores are named using noun
phrases in singular-record form with an
identifiable prefix.
Prefix used: DS_ - Data Store
Examples: DS_USER, DS_CAMPAIGN,
DS_DONATION, DS_CHATLOG

div.div:
- Donor - Registers, searches / discovers campaigns, makes
donations, and views recommendations & impact scores.
- Campaign Creator - Registers, creates and manages
fundraising campaigns, and tracks their status.
- Admin / Manager - Manages users, reviews fraud-flagged
campaigns, approves/rejects submissions, and views analytics.

div.div:
- Solid arrows represent data moving from a source to a
destination process, entity, or store.
- Dashed arrows represent control / feedback flow such as
alerts, approvals, or status information.
- Double-headed arrows represent a two-way Read/Write
exchange with a data store, or a request/response pair.
- Each process reads from and/or writes to its relevant
data store(s).

rect.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));
stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 972px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2108px; margin-left: 2098px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
- All data stores start with prefix 'DS_' followed by a
meaningful noun.
- Examples: DS_USER, DS_CAMPAIGN, DS_DONATION,
DS_CHATLOG, DS_AUDIT, DS_IMPACT, DS_ADMINLOG.
- Each store holds the persistent data used and produced
by its related process(es).
